parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ctx_convertix.write_jobs
(queue_name, target_db, target_table, op, dedup_key, payload)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.queue_name) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.target_db) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.target_table) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.op) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dedup_key) }},
  CAST(FROM_BASE64({{ JSON.stringify($json.payload_b64) }}) AS JSON)
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  payload = VALUES(payload),
  status = IF(status='done','done','pending'),
  last_error = NULL;
